auth.verify_body:
Hello {{name}},

Thank you for creating your GymPro account. To get started, please verify your email address by clicking the button below:

Verify Email Address

If the button doesn't work, copy and paste this link into your browser:

{{verifyUrl}}

If you didn't create this account, you can safely ignore this email.

Best regards,
The GymPro Team
auth.reset_password_body:
Hello {{name}},

We received a request to reset the password for your GymPro account. If you made this request, click the button below to create a new password:

Reset Password

If the button doesn't work, copy and paste this link into your browser:

{{resetUrl}}

This link will expire in 1 hour for security purposes.

If you didn't request a password reset, please ignore this email. Your password will remain unchanged.

Best regards,
The GymPro Team
auth.resent: Verification email has been resent successfully. Please check your inbox and spam folder.
auth.already_verified: Your email address has already been verified. You're all set!

onboarding.completed_subject: Welcome to GymPro - Let's Get Started!
onboarding.completed_body:
Hello {{name}},

Welcome to GymPro! 🎉 We're thrilled to have you on board.

Your account setup is complete, and you now have access to all the features you need to manage your gym operations efficiently.

Your Free Trial

You're starting with a {{trialDays}}-day free trial of GymPro. This gives you full access to explore all our features and see how GymPro can transform your gym management.

What's Next?

  • Explore your dashboard and familiarize yourself with the tools
  • Add your gym members and staff
  • Set up your classes and schedules
  • Customize your gym profile and settings

Manage Your Subscription

You can visit the subscription page in your dashboard anytime to:

  • View your current plan and trial details
  • Upgrade to a premium plan
  • Manage billing and payment methods
  • Track your trial progress

If you have any questions or need assistance getting started, our support team is always here to help.

Thank you for choosing GymPro!

Best regards,
The GymPro Team
onboarding.member_completed_body:
Hello {{name}},

Welcome to GymPro! 🎉 Your account setup is complete.

You can now log in to your dashboard to:

  • Track your workouts and progress
  • View your gym memberships
  • Check class schedules and book sessions
  • Stay updated with gym announcements

If you have any questions or need assistance, please don't hesitate to contact your gym.

See you at the gym!

Best regards,
The GymPro Team

subscription.created_body:
Hello {{name}},

Great news! Your subscription to {{planName}} has been successfully activated.

You now have access to all the features included in your plan. We're excited to help you manage your gym operations more efficiently.

What's Next?

  • Explore your dashboard to get started
  • Set up your gym profile and preferences
  • Invite your team members to collaborate

If you have any questions or need assistance, our support team is here to help.

Thank you for choosing GymPro!

Best regards,
The GymPro Team
subscription.cancelled_body:
Hello {{name}},

We've processed your cancellation request. Your subscription will remain active until {{date}}, and you'll continue to have full access to all features until then.

What Happens Next?

  • Your subscription will not renew automatically
  • You can continue using all features until {{date}}
  • Your data will be safely stored after cancellation
  • You can reactivate your subscription anytime before {{date}}

We're sorry to see you go. If there's anything we could have done better, we'd love to hear your feedback.

If you change your mind, you can easily reactivate your subscription from your account settings.

Best regards,
The GymPro Team
subscription.upgrade_subject: Your GymPro Subscription Has Been Upgraded 🎉
subscription.upgrade_body:
Hello {{name}},

Great news! Your subscription has been successfully upgraded to {{planName}}.

You now have access to all the additional features and benefits included in your new plan, helping you manage your gym even more efficiently.

What’s New?

  • Access to all features of the {{planName}} plan
  • Improved tools to manage members and subscriptions
  • Enhanced performance and priority support

The upgrade takes effect immediately, and any applicable charges have been processed securely.

If you have any questions or want help getting the most out of your new plan, our support team is always here for you.

Thank you for continuing to grow with GymPro!

Best regards,
The GymPro Team
subscription.reactivated_body:
Hello {{name}},

Great news! Your GymPro subscription has been successfully reactivated.

Your account is now fully restored with all your previous settings and data intact. You can continue managing your gym operations without any interruption.

What's Restored:

  • All your gym and member data
  • Your custom settings and preferences
  • Full access to all plan features
  • Automatic renewal for uninterrupted service

Thank you for coming back! We're excited to continue supporting your business.

Best regards,
The GymPro Team
subscription.downgrade_scheduled_body:
Hello {{name}},

We've received your request to change your subscription plan. Your plan will be updated to {{planName}} on {{date}}.

Important Information:

  • Your current plan remains active until {{date}}
  • You'll continue to have full access to current features
  • The new plan will take effect automatically on {{date}}
  • You can cancel this change anytime before {{date}}

After the change takes effect, your billing will be adjusted to reflect the new plan pricing.

If you have any questions about this change or need assistance, please don't hesitate to contact our support team.

Best regards,
The GymPro Team
subscription.pending_change_cancelled_body:
Hello {{name}},

Your pending plan change has been cancelled successfully. Your subscription will continue on your current plan.

Best regards,
The GymPro Team
subscription.expiring_soon_body:
Hello {{name}},

This is a friendly reminder that your GymPro subscription will end on {{date}}.

You’ll continue to have full access to all features until then.

What You Can Do:

  • Renew or upgrade your subscription to avoid interruption
  • Review your plan and billing details

You can manage your subscription anytime from your account settings.

Best regards,
The GymPro Team
subscription.expiring_tomorrow_body:
Hello {{name}},

Just a quick reminder that your GymPro subscription will end tomorrow ({{date}}).

To avoid losing access to your features and data, you can renew your subscription at any time from your dashboard.

If you have any questions or need help, our support team is here for you.

Best regards,
The GymPro Team
subscription.expired_body:
Hello {{name}},

Your GymPro subscription has expired, and access to premium features is now limited.

Good news: Your data is still safe, and you can reactivate your subscription anytime to regain full access.

Simply visit your account settings to choose a plan and continue where you left off.

Best regards,
The GymPro Team
subscription.downgrade_effective_soon_body:
Hello {{name}},

This is a reminder that your subscription plan will change to {{planName}} on {{date}}.

Your current plan remains fully active until that date, with uninterrupted access to all features.

If you’d like to make changes or cancel this update, you can do so from your account settings before {{date}}.

Best regards,
The GymPro Team
subscription.renewed_body:
Hello {{name}},

Great news! Your subscription to {{planName}} has been successfully renewed.

You now have uninterrupted access to all the features included in your plan. No action is required on your part.

What’s Next?

  • Continue managing your gym with full access to all tools
  • Check your dashboard for updated billing and plan details
  • Invite or manage team members as needed

If you have any questions or need assistance, our support team is always here to help.

Thank you for continuing to use GymPro!

Best regards,
The GymPro Team
subscription.gym_membership_added_body:
Hello {{name}},

We're excited to inform you that you've been added as a member to {{gymName}}!

You can now log in to your dashboard to view your membership details, tracking your progress, and stay updated with gym announcements.

Best regards,
The {{gymName}} Team

email.gym_announcement_body:
{{gymName}}

Announcement

Hello {{name}},

{{title}}

{{message}}

You are receiving this notification because you are a member of {{gymName}}.

The {{gymName}} Team

gym.closure_added_body:
Hello {{name}},

Please be informed that {{gymName}} will be temporarily closed for: {{reason}}.

Closure Period:
From: {{start}}
Until: {{end}}

We apologize for any inconvenience.

Best regards,
The {{gymName}} Team
gym.closure_deleted_body:
Hello {{name}},

Great news! The previously scheduled closure for {{gymName}} has been cancelled or the gym has reopened early.

The gym is now following its regular working hours.

See you at the gym!

Best regards,
The {{gymName}} Team

coach.request_body:
Hello {{name}},

You have received a new coaching request from {{memberName}}.

Message:

{{message}}

You can review and respond to this request from your Coach Dashboard.

Best regards,
The GymPro Team
coach.respond_accept_body:
Hello {{name}},

Great news! {{coachName}} has accepted your coaching request.

You can now start working together. Check your dashboard for more details.

Best regards,
The GymPro Team
coach.respond_decline_body:
Hello {{name}},

We're writing to inform you that {{coachName}} has declined your coaching request at this time.

Don't worry, there are many other great coaches available on GymPro. Feel free to explore and find another match!

Best regards,
The GymPro Team

admin.user_signup_body:
Hello Admin,

A new user has just signed up on the platform.

  • Name: {{name}}

Please review their profile if necessary.

Best regards,
The GymPro Team
admin.coach_approved_body:
Hello {{name}},

Congratulations! Your request to become a coach on GymPro has been approved.

You can now access the Coach Dashboard and start managing your clients and programs.

Welcome to the team!

Best regards,
The GymPro Team
admin.coach_rejected_body:
Hello {{name}},

Thank you for your interest in becoming a coach on GymPro.

After careful review, we regret to inform you that we are unable to approve your request at this time.

If you have any questions, please contact our support team.

Best regards,
The GymPro Team
admin.user_subscribed_body:
Hello Admin,

A user has subscribed to a new plan.

  • User: {{name}}
  • Plan: {{planName}}

Best regards,
The GymPro Team
admin.gym_created_body:
Hello Admin,

A new gym has been created on the platform.

  • Gym Name: {{gymName}}
  • Owner: {{name}}

Please review the details.

Best regards,
The GymPro Team
admin.coach_request_body:
Hello Admin,

A new coach access request has been submitted by {{name}}.

Please review their certification details and documents in the admin dashboard.

Best regards,
The GymPro Team

notification.gym_membership_added_body: You have been added to {{gymName}}. Welcome!

gym.closure_added_body: {{gymName}} will be closed from {{start}} to {{end}} due to {{reason}}.
gym.closure_deleted_body: The closure for {{gymName}} has been cancelled. We are open!

admin.coach_approved_body: Your request to become a coach has been approved! You can now access the Coach Dashboard.
admin.coach_rejected_body: Your request to become a coach has been rejected.
admin.coach_request_body: {{name}} requested coach access. Click to review.

auth.reset_password_body: Check your email for instructions to reset your password.

onboarding.member_completed_body: Your account setup is complete. Log in to track your workouts and view your gym memberships!

subscription.upgraded_body: Success! Your subscription has been upgraded to {{planName}}.
subscription.cancelled_body: Your subscription has been cancelled and will end on {{date}}. Reactivate anytime to keep using the app.
subscription.reactivated_body: Welcome back! Your GymPro subscription has been successfully reactivated.
subscription.downgrade_scheduled_body: Your plan change to {{planName}} is scheduled for {{date}}.
subscription.pending_change_cancelled_body: Your pending plan change has been cancelled. Your current plan remains active.
subscription.expiring_soon_body: Your subscription will end on {{date}}. Renew now to avoid any interruption.
subscription.expiring_tomorrow_body: Your subscription ends tomorrow ({{date}}). Renew now to keep full access.
subscription.expired_body: Your subscription has expired. Reactivate anytime from your account to restore access.
subscription.downgrade_effective_soon_body: Reminder: your plan will change to {{planName}} on {{date}}.
